title: Improving International Services Access, BNI Relocates Singapore Office to the Strategic Raffles Place
body: PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk or BNI continues to strive to improve service accessibility for international customers.

title: First half in, MDKA saw 110% surge in revenue
body: The performance of PT Merdeka Gold Coppert Tbk (MDKA) skyrocketed in the first half (H1) of 2024 compared to the same period in 2023.

title: Eight million shares in Arkadia Digital (DIGI) acquired by Iwa Sukresno Karunia
body: On Wednesday, October 2, individual investor Iwa Sukresno Karunia invested 8 million more shares in PT Arkadia Digital Media Tbk (DIGI), a web portal and multimedia content industry business. Iwa's share portion increased from 24.75% to 25.24% through the transaction via PT Korea Investment And Sekuritas Indonesia. Furthermore, Low Tuck Kwong acquired 95,800 shares in the mining industry issuer and coal contractor PT Bayan Resources Tbk (BYAN), while Eko Desriyanto also purchased 2 million shares in the hotel and restaurant management company PT Idea Indonesia Tbk (IDEA).

title: Foreign buying volume rises, net foreign volume surplus to 712.63 million shares
body: Foreign buying volume on Wednesday, October 2, increased significantly, reaching 6.15 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales volume totaled just 5.44 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume surplus of approximately 712.63 million shares. The purchase of shares in the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) amounted to 2.12 billion shares with a net volume of 808.16 million shares, then started the share trading list.

title: Low Tuck Kwong acquires 1.5 billion shares of Bayan Resources (BYAN)
body: On Monday, September 30, Low Tuck Kwong, the founder and president of PT Bayan Resources Tbk (BYAN), acquired over 1.5 billion shares from the coal mining issuer. His share portion of BYAN has increased to 40.16% from his previous 35% control. He utilized PT Maybank Sekuritas Indonesia and BUT Deutsche Bank AG to complete this share purchase transaction.

title: Improving International Services Access, BNI Relocates Singapore Office to the Strategic Raffles Place
body: PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk or BNI continues to strive to improve service accessibility for international customers.

title: First half in, MDKA saw 110% surge in revenue
body: The performance of PT Merdeka Gold Coppert Tbk (MDKA) skyrocketed in the first half (H1) of 2024 compared to the same period in 2023.

Meanwhile, foreign sales volume totaled just 5.44 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume surplus of approximately 712.63 million shares. The purchase of shares in the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) amounted to 2.12 billion shares with a net volume of 808.16 million shares, then started the share trading list.

title: Low Tuck Kwong acquires 1.5 billion shares of Bayan Resources (BYAN)
body: On Monday, September 30, Low Tuck Kwong, the founder and president of PT Bayan Resources Tbk (BYAN), acquired over 1.5 billion shares from the coal mining issuer. His share portion of BYAN has increased to 40.16% from his previous 35% control. He utilized PT Maybank Sekuritas Indonesia and BUT Deutsche Bank AG to complete this share purchase transaction.

title: Strengthening corporate services, BBNI readies BNI Direct
body: PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBNI) will launch BNI Direct, a digital platform designed to improve services for corporate users.

title: OJK to issue investigation on Prajogo Pangestu’s companies
body: Financial Services Authority (OJK) is currently investigating two Barito Group companies, PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk (BREN) and PT Petrindo Jaya Kreasi Tbk (CUAN), regarding false trading allegation in the stock market.

title: Fortune named its Top 10 Most Powerful Women 2024
body: Fortune recently crowned 100 most powerful women of 2024 from various business sectors across the globe. In the list, 8 out of the top 10 women came from United States (US) region.

title: ATIC subsidiary acquires Payrol Prima Indonesia shares
body: PT Karyaputra Suryagemilang (KS), a subsidiary of PT Anabatic Technologies Tbk (ATIC), has purchased 3.04% or equivalent to 76 shares of PT Payrol Prima Indonesia.

title: Fortune named Nicke Widyawati in the 100 Most Powerful Women
body: Nicke Widyawati, President Director of PT Pertamina (Persero) was named in Fortune's 100 Most Powerful Women. Her figure is in 47th place out of 100 influential women according to the multi-platform media company.

title: Govt to hold another state sukuk auction next week, aiming for IDR 8 trillion
body: The Indonesian government will hold another auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or government sukuk on Tuesday (8/10) next week, with an indicative target of IDR 8 trillion.

title: LPCK subsidiary converted debt securities worth IDR 3.07 trillion
body: PT Megakreasi Cikarang Permai (MKCP), a subsidiary of PT Lippo Cikarang Tbk (LPCK), converted Mahkota Sentosa Utama I 2019 Long-Term Debt Securities (SUJP) into 3.07 billion shares in PT Mahkota Sentosa Utama (MSU).

title: ALII subsidiary to make voluntary prepayment of US$20.82 million to OCP Asia
body: PT Mahakam Coal Terminal (MCT), a subsidiary of PT Ancara Logistic Indonesia Tbk (ALII), will pay off the remaining obligations earlier than the due date (voluntary prepayment) of US$20.82 billion.

title: Sigma Energy Compressindo to issue interim dividend of IDR 3 per share
body: PT Sigma Energi Compressindo Tbk (SICO), an oil and gas service company established circa 2007, is planning an interim dividend distribution of IDR 3 per share or IDR 2.73 billion in total.

title: Avia Avian bags dividend income of IDR 107.99 billion
body: PT Avia Avian Tbk (AVIA) has collected dividends from two of its subsidiaries, PT Tirtakencana Tatawarna (Tirta Tatawarna) and PT Tirtakencana Batamindo (Tirta Batamindo), worth a total of IDR 107.99 billion.

title: Controller increases its share in Wijaya Cahaya Timber (FWCT) by almost 65 million
body: On Friday, September 27, the controlling shareholder of PT Wijaya Cahaya Timber Tbk (FWCT), PT Fortuna Anugrah Sumber Terpadu, made the decision to add more shares. With this most recent acquisition, the investor's ownership of the plywood industry issuer's shares increased to 60.8% from its previous 57.34%. This transaction was facilitated by PT Lotus Andalan Sekuritas.

title: Automotive startup Broom secures Series A+ funding of USD 25 million
body: Broom, a digital automotive startup, announces the conclusion of Series A+ funding round worth USD 25 million led by Openspace and followed by several renowned investors, such as AC Ventures and MUFG Innovation Partners.

title: In October, three issuers will pay bonds totaling over one trillion Rupiah
body: Seven bonds from seven different issuers will mature in October. It's interesting to note that three of the issuers are listed as going to pay bonds worth over IDR 1 trillion or more.

title: Again, JCI seen in sluggish state all day
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) declined again throughout the day today (2/10).

title: BMHS plans an expansion, IKN’s prospects still reviewed
body: PT Bundamedik Tbk (BMHS), the managing company of Bunda Hospital network, has reaffirmed its expansion plan within the next 3-5 years to untapped locations.

title: Utilising DHE SDA, PTBA to work with 3 state-owned banks
body: PT Bukit Asam Tbk (PTBA) has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) for utilisation of Forex Export Proceeds from Nature-Resourced Export Goods (DHE SDA) with 3 state-owned banks.

title: SUN auction reported bids of IDR 46.65 trillion this time
body: Total incoming bids reported in the latest auction of Government Securities (lit. Surat Utang Negara/SUN) yesterday (1/10) reached IDR 46.65 trillion.

title: NICE secures IDR 15.83 billion loan from LX International Corp
body: PT Adhi Kartiko Pratama Tbk (NICE) has received a loan of USD 1 million, equal to IDR 15.83 billion, from LX International Corp (LXI), its affiliate.

title: Two new companies queuing for IPO, price starts at IDR 128 per share
body: PT Verona Indah Pictures Tbk (VERN) and PT Master Print Tbk (PTMR) is currently conducting public offering process of its shares from today (2/10) until October 4, 2024.

title: Masterprint to acquire consumable product distributor
body: PT Master Print Tbk (PTMR) is said to acquire 99% of PT Global Putra Kusuma (GKP), a distributor of consumables and machine for Small and Medium Enterprises (SME).

title: First half saw ZBRA’s loss swelled 179%
body: The loss recorded by PT Dosni Roha Indonesia Tbk (ZBRA) swelled 179% year-on-year (yoy) in H1 2024 to IDR 166.11 billion from the initial IDR 59.52 billion seen in H1 2023.

title: Foreign buy recorded larger, net foreign volume surplus at 478.21 million shares
body: On Tuesday, October 1, foreign investors were seen purchasing shares, resulting in a foreign buying volume of 3.39 billion shares. Share sales were also carried out, with a foreign sales volume of 2.91 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume hit a surplus at 478.21 million shares. The share purchase list then began with the purchase of around 951.53 million shares of coal mining company PT Bumi Resources Tbk (BUMI), for a net volume of 300.18 million shares. Shares of BUMI's subsidiary, PT Bumi Resources Minerals Tbk (BRMS), which works in the mineral mining sector, were also purchased for 230.80 million shares with a net volume of 48.96 million shares.

title: Dima Investindo receives 440 million Kurniatmitra (KMDS) shares from Miki Ojisan
body: PT Miki Ojisan Indomitra, the company that controls PT Kurniamitra Duta Sentosa Tbk (KMDS), released 440 million shares to PT Dima Investindo, a new investor, on Thursday, September 26. Miki Ojisan used to own 76.19% of the shares in this issuer in the food and beverage industry, but after these shares were released, his ownership fell to 21.19%. With 55% of the shares, Dima Investindo is now the new controller of KMDS. PT BCA Sekuritas led both of the transactions.

title: BPS saw deflation in the past 5 months
body: Statistics Indonesia (BPS) recorded deflation of 0.12% in September 2024, which was a five-month streak since May 2024. This condition has never occurred within the past two years, even in the same period.

title: Trisula Internasional to allocate interim dividend of IDR 7 billion
body: PT Trisula Internasional Tbk (TRIS), a textile and garment manufacturer, will distribute cash dividend of IDR 7 billion or IDR 2.25 per share.

title: BRIS to work with Prudential Sharia to expand service
body: PT Bank Syariah Indonesia Tbk (BRIS) announces its latest collaboration with PT Prudential Sharia Life Assurance to expand the scope of bancassurance services.

title: Foreign sell hit 4.82 billion shares, net foreign volume dropped to -587.45 million shares
body: Stock buying and selling activity on Monday, September 30, was completed with foreign selling volume reaching 4.82 billion shares and foreign buying volume at 4.23 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume closed at -587.45 million shares.

title: August 2024 saw tourist visits hiked up to 1.34 million
body: The number of international tourist visits hit 1.34 million in August 2024, up 2.23% from the previous month. However, cumulatively, it has yet to match the number of tourist visits pre-pandemic.

title: JCI gains strides throughout the day
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) soared throughout today’s (1/10) session although has yet to fully rebound to 7,500-ish.

title: Prima Globalindo Logistik to distribute interim dividend of IDR 2 per share
body: PT Prima Globalindo Logistik Tbk (PPGL), a logistics and delivery company, announces the plan of interim dividend distribution of IDR 1.54 billion or IDR 2 per share.
